_comment: Phase 1a seed input for seed-labor-opening-balances.js. Copy this file to scripts/opening-balances.json (NOT committed) and fill in real values. Required fields per entry: staff_email + opening_balance_minutes. Optional: reason (becomes the ledger entry's reason text). 0 is a valid value; the script does NOT default to zero — every staff to be seeded must appear here explicitly.

<staff_email_lowercase>.opening_balance_minutes: integer minutes; 0 OK; capped at 2400 unless override below
<staff_email_lowercase>.allow_above_cap: optional bool; only true if the admin explicitly wants to seed above the 2400-minute cap

makaila@example.com.reason: Migrated from QuickBooks records, period ending 2026-05-31

alex@example.com.reason: Senior tech, grandfathered balance per HR sign-off
